channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Swedish Migration Policy Reform Leads to Deportation Order for Infant Born in Sweden
item.description: An article published on February 20, 2026, reports that an eight-month-old baby named Emanuel, born in Sweden to Iranian parents who live and work legally in the country, is facing deportation to Iran...

item.title: Lego Recreates Monet’s Water Lilies as a 3,179-Piece Model
item.description: Lego has unveiled a new set that transforms Claude Monet’s iconic painting 'Bridge Over a Pond of Water Lilies' into a 3,179-piece construction. The set recreates the soft haze, layered colors, and ic...

item.title: Operational Challenges Limit Effectiveness of NATO Tanks in Ukraine
item.description: The Leopard 2, Germany’s premier NATO tank, has faced significant operational challenges in Ukraine, highlighting that even advanced military technology requires robust support infrastructure to be ef...

item.title: Building a Startup Entirely on European Infrastructure: Challenges, Trade-offs and Lessons Learned
item.description: In this article, the author recounts his experience building a startup entirely on European infrastructure rather than relying on dominant American hyperscalers such as AWS. Motivated by concerns abou...

item.title: Hayden Clay Creates Geometric Cloud Forms and Dreamlike Neighborhoods in Pastel Digital Art
item.description: Artist Hayden Clay reimagines everyday elements like clouds in unexpected geometric shapes, departing from traditional fluffy, organic forms to present soft, floaty versions structured as perfect cube...

item.title: Allegation of ICE Agents Assaulting U.S. Citizen Sparks Outrage Online
item.description: A post published by Raw America on Substack alleges that a U.S. citizen was violently confronted by individuals identified as Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents. According to the account...

item.title: Arsenal Faces Legal Challenge After Dismissing Kit Manager Over Social Media Posts on Israel-Gaza Conflict
item.description: Arsenal Football Club is facing legal action after dismissing long-serving kit manager Mark Bonnick over social media posts concerning the Israel-Gaza conflict. Bonnick, who worked at the club for mor...

item.title: Tensions Rise Over Disarmament Demands as U.S. and Israel Warn of Renewed Gaza Offensive
item.description: The article reports escalating tensions between Hamas, Israel, and the United States over demands for the disarmament of Palestinian resistance factions in Gaza. Former U.S. President Donald Trump, al...

item.title: Taliban Authorities Destroy Hundreds of Musical Instruments in Parwan and Laghman as Ban on Music Continues
item.description: Taliban authorities in Afghanistan have reportedly burned hundreds of musical instruments in the provinces of Parwan and Laghman as part of their ongoing enforcement of a nationwide ban on music. Acco...

item.title: Russian Supreme Court Upholds Massive Fine Against Google Over Blocked Pro-Kremlin Media Accounts
item.description: Russia’s Supreme Court has upheld a ruling requiring Google to pay 91.5 quintillion rubles (approximately $1.2 quintillion) in penalties stemming from a legal dispute that began in 2020. The case orig...

item.title: Study Highlights Major Imbalance in EU Farm Subsidies Favoring Meat Over Plant Proteins
item.description: A new report by the charity Foodrise reveals that beef and lamb received 580 times more EU subsidies than legumes in 2020, underscoring what campaigners describe as a structural imbalance in European ...

item.title: U.S. Corn and Soybean Farmers Face Financial Challenges Amid Rising Costs and Global Competition
item.description: Corn and soybean farmers across the United States are entering a challenging growing season due to rising production costs, low crop prices, and unstable global demand. Mark Mueller, president of the ...

item.title: U.S. Military Ready for Potential Strikes on Iran as Early as This Weekend, But No Final Decision Made, Sources Say
item.description: According to an exclusive CBS News report by senior White House correspondent Jennifer Jacobs, top U.S. national security officials have informed President Donald Trump that the military is prepared t...

item.title: Valve prevails in lawsuit against Rothschild for patent infringement and violation of anti-patent troll law
item.description: Valve Corporation has won its 2023 lawsuit against Leigh Rothschild and several associated companies, including Rothschild Broadcast Distribution Systems LLC, Display Technologies LLC, Patent Asset Ma...

item.title: Rep. Ted Lieu Highlights Unverified Allegations Against Trump in Epstein Documents During Hearing
item.description: On February 4, 2026, Rep. Ted Lieu (D-CA) spoke at an event and later during a House Judiciary Committee hearing, drawing attention to documents related to Jeffrey Epstein. He claimed that Donald Trum...

item.title: Kenyan Intelligence Report Reveals Recruitment of Nationals for Russia-Ukraine Conflict
item.description: A Kenyan intelligence report has revealed that over 1,000 Kenyans have been recruited to fight for Russia in the ongoing Russia-Ukraine war. The report, presented by the National Intelligence Service ...

item.title: Gabriel Rufián Proposes New Left-Wing Coalition Amid Regional Tensions in Spain
item.description: Gabriel Rufián, spokesperson for Esquerra Republicana de Catalunya (ERC) in the Spanish Congress, recently announced a proposal to 'refound the left' by forming a coalition of left-leaning parties bey...

item.title: The Strategic Advantages of Using Specialized Platforms to Hire Technical Writers
item.description: The article examines the challenges companies face when hiring a qualified technical writer and argues that specialized hiring platforms provide a more efficient and reliable solution than traditional...

item.title: Comprehensive 2026 Review of the Citi Custom Cash Card: Rewards, Benefits, and Transfer Partners
item.description: The article provides a detailed 2026 review of the Citi Custom Cash credit card, highlighting its flexible rewards structure and overall value within the Citi ThankYou ecosystem. The card’s main featu...

item.title: An In-Depth Overview of Harbeth Speakers and Their Technological Evolution
item.description: The article explores the history, technological development, and current product lineup of British audio manufacturer Harbeth, a brand deeply influenced by decades of BBC research into studio monitor ...
